zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecily Troutbeck於大約1428年出生在英國爾鄧翰 奧 馮 希爾時，她的父親John Troutbeck18歲，母親Lady Margareth Hulse16歲。她於1443年之前與John Done III結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1459年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cecily Troutbeck于大约1428年出生在英国爾鄧翰 奧 馮 希爾时，她的父亲John Troutbeck18岁，母亲Lady Margareth Hulse16岁。她于1443年之前与John Done III结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1459年之后。

nameMeanings.name: Troutbeck
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from either of two places called Troutbeck (Westm and Cumb).

nameMeanings.name: Cecily
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cecilie
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cicely
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Cecily Troutbeck was born about 1428, in Dunham on the Hill, Cheshire, England, her father, John Troutbeck, was 18 and her mother, Lady Margareth Hulse, was 16. She married John Done III before 1443. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died after 1459.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecily Troutbeck est née environ 1428, à Dunham on the Hill, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, John Troutbeck, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Lady Margareth Hulse, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé John Done III avant 1443. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée après 1459.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecily Troutbeckが約1428年にイギリスチェシュアイアダンハム オン ス ヒルで生まれた時，父John Troutbeckは18歳，母Lady Margareth Hulseは16歳であった。1443年以前にJohn Done IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1459年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecily Troutbeck(이)가 대략 1428년 영국 체실르 던함  테 힐에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Troutbeck(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Margareth Hulse(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1443년 이전 John Done III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1459년 이후 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecily Troutbeck родилась около 1428 г. в местности дунам он т хилл, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Troutbeck было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margareth Hulse, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Done III перед 1443 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла после 1459 г.
